titleStmt.title: Jordan – Bani Saxar – Questionnaire (Hgesh) (Part 3)
WIBARAB Corpus
titleStmt.funder: Funded by the European Research Council under the Grant Agreement 101020127

publicationStmt.distributor: Austrian Center for Digital Humanities and Cultural Heritage

recording.p: Recorded during Jordan Fieldwork Campaign Antonella Torzullo 2023

prefixDef.p: Private URIs using the teiCorpusHeader prefix are pointers to any element in the WIBARAB teiCorpus document.
Private URIs using the share prefix are pointers to audio file residing on the WIBARAB network share.
Private URIs using the geo prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a place element in VICAV Geodata list.
Private URIs using the dmp prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB DMP document..
Private URIs using the zotid prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a biblStruct element in the TEI export of the VICAV Zotero Group library.
Private URIs using the sources prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB list of sources.

spanGrp.span: He has a lot of money
but, without ć, you killed, knocked her down with the ć
( I think he did not get the exact word maybe?)
since, I have been waiting him for one hour
(I think it is used only where the location comes before- a sort of in it)
grand-father, my grand-pa, my grand-ma, old man, old woman
the children play in the street
arm, elbow, finger, chest, shoulder, back, belly- stomach, leg ( krāʕ not just for foot )
foot,sole of the foot and heel
Blind, one-eyed,cross-eyed, bald, deaf, not speaking - mute
group of animals, cattle and group of camels
goat, small male goat, small female goat
cow, ox, calf, she calf, he donkey, she donkey, young she donkey
(ǧahš -peasant) she makes a point about the fact the Bed use gahawa syn, while fallaḥiyyīn no
camel, she camel, chicken, male chicken, chick, duck, goose, rabbit, cat
snail, again explication of how to sa "become + color"
monkey, fox, pig, hedgehog, the fox is also ḥṣēni or abū slēmā​n, sun, moon, cloud, rain, rainbow, shadow, water, river
I do not know ehat it is
cauliflower I do not know, peas I do not know, chick peas, parsley , thyme, coriander, sesame, fig
pear, plums, peaches, marillen (?), strawberries, watermelon, melon
What are the plums? palm, what is th eminše?
we say naxal, what is the minše?
(?) in the cattle, area without trees
leaves, what is the ʕidge? It became difficult
